description: Next-session forecasts for all holdings and market indices. Generated before each trading session. Accuracy is tracked session-by-session to build a feedback loop.

next_session.dominant_variable: Regime stable post-TALKS_NEUTRAL outcome. No new binary events until April 22 ceasefire expiry. P012 (ASTRA MICRO) and P013 (INDIGO) CHECK DATES on April 14. IT sector digesting TCS sell-on-news. FII distribution trend a key overhang.
next_session.talks_outcome_confirmed: TALKS_NEUTRAL — Pakistan's modest goal (keep talks going) achieved. Vance dismissed Iran's 10-point plan. Ghalibaf said 3 clauses already violated. No breakthrough. Ceasefire holding through April 22 deadline. Trump delayed Iran infrastructure strikes to April 22 — diplomatic pressure tactic.

scenarios.label: Quiet weekend + TCS recovery + DII support
scenarios.description: No adverse weekend geopolitical developments. Nifty continues recovery from April 9 low. TCS attempts ₹2,560-2,580 recovery. Banking and IT lead. Ceasefire holding = risk-on continues.
scenarios.market_tone: Mild positive open. IT sector attempts TCS recovery. Banking holds. FII likely net seller but lighter. P012 (ASTRA MICRO) needs +3.8% to score RIGHT — unlikely unless fresh defense catalyst.

scenarios.label: Mild consolidation — profit booking after recovery
scenarios.description: Profit-booking after Friday's recovery. Nifty gives back 100-200 pts. FII selling weighs. No fresh catalysts. ASTRA MICRO likely scores WRONG (P012 check date).
scenarios.market_tone: Flat-to-mildly negative. Index-level consolidation. IT soft (TCS). P013 scores WRONG. P012 likely scores WRONG. Watch 23,900 support.

scenarios.label: Weekend ceasefire stress — WAR_PREMIUM signals return
scenarios.description: Weekend news: ceasefire violation, Lebanon escalation, or Hormuz incident. War premium return signal. Nifty gap-down.
scenarios.market_tone: Gap-down -2% or more. Defense stocks (ASTRA MICRO) may spike. SETFGOLD holds/rises. FII heavy selling resumes.

next_session.base_case_scenario: Bull/neutral scenario (60%): Nifty 23,900-24,200, mild positive session. P012 (ASTRA MICRO) most likely scores WRONG on April 14 given ~4% gap to target. P013 (INDIGO) scores WRONG confirmed.
next_session.note: April 14 is the first post-Islamabad trading session. Weekend is a key risk window (any ceasefire strain news). Apply FORECAST_PAT003: watch for weekend geopolitical headline as potential REVERSAL TRIGGER. FII distribution trend ongoing — 2 consecutive selling days post-ceasefire (₹2,811 Cr + ₹1,711 Cr). CHECK DATES: P012 and P013 both on April 14. P013 WILL SCORE WRONG. P012: 40% RIGHT / 60% WRONG.

previous_sessions.talks_outcome: TALKS_NEUTRAL — proximity talks, no breakthrough, ceasefire holds, next deadline April 22
previous_sessions.error_analysis: Base scenario (TALKS_NEUTRAL, 45% probability) materialized as expected. Nifty closed at 24,050 — just above the base scenario ceiling of 24,000. Direction correct (recovery, not WAR_PREMIUM_RETURN). Slight outperformance vs base explained by Trump's April 22 strike delay announcement causing intraday Brent crash from $96.51 to $91-93, which provided additional positive impetus beyond what base scenario modeled. TCS sell-on-news confirmed (closed ₹2,539.80, P018 NOT triggered). A008 (ASTRA MICRO ₹1,048-1,052) NOT triggered. A005 (SETFGOLD) exit window active — partial sale recommended.

FII_CEASEFIRE_DISTRIBUTION pattern now at 2 occurrences — candidate for framework promotion at weekly review.

previous_sessions.error_analysis: WRONG. Forecast range 23,800-24,100, actual close 23,775.10 — 25 pts BELOW lower bound. Forecast direction FLAT_TO_SLIGHTLY_UP, actual -0.93%. Root cause: Trump's statement that US-Iran situation 'remains tense until a real pact is reached' dampened post-ceasefire optimism more than expected. Bloomberg noted India rally showed 'signs of short covering, lacks fresh buying' — indicating April 8 rally was partially technical. TCS Q4FY26 results (post-market) were strong (revenue beat, record TCV $12B, ₹31 dividend, AI crossing $2.3B) but announced after market hours — positive catalyst deferred to April 10. Running session accuracy: 1 correct / 3 scored = 33.3%.
previous_sessions.tcs_q4_results_summary: Revenue ₹70,698 cr (+9.64% YoY, BEAT est ₹69,932 cr). PAT ₹13,718 cr (+12.22% YoY, slight miss vs est ₹13,919 cr). EBIT margin 25% FY26 full year (+70bps YoY, highest in 4 years). Deal TCV Q4: $12 billion (highest ever). FY26 TCV: $40.7 billion. AI revenue: $2.3B annualized. Mega deals: 3 in Q4, 5 in FY26. Final dividend ₹31/share (total FY26: ₹110/share). OVERALL: BEAT on revenue, strong TCV, dividends above expectations.
previous_sessions.notes: April 9 — EOD SCORED. Nifty closed at 23,775 (below forecast range). TCS Q4 results announced post-market: strong beat on revenue/TCV/dividend. April 10 Islamabad talks setup confirmed: US VP Vance + Witkoff + Kushner leading US side; Iran FM Araghchi + Ghalibaf. Key tension: Iran wants Hormuz oversight, US holds firm on nuclear enrichment red line. CNN: 'teetering ceasefire bodes ill for treacherous US-Iran talks'. Probability of breakdown remains elevated.
First session of FY27. No prior forecast was generated for this session.
Forecast SIDEWAYS_UP (+0.4%). Actual: Nifty +0.68%. Direction CORRECT. IT sector decoupled from geopolitical risk — HCLTECH +2.73%, INFY +2.54%, TCS +2.66%.
previous_sessions.error_analysis: Direction correct. Magnitude slightly underestimated (+0.68% vs +0.4% forecast). IT/USD decoupling was the key driver — now tracked as FORECAST_PAT001.

previous_sessions.notes: Forecast BINARY_VOLATILE (base -0.8%, extension scenario). Actual: Nifty +3.78% on CEASEFIRE DEAL + RBI rate unchanged. Direction WRONG — underweighted deal scenario (assigned 20% probability, it materialised at 100%). Brent crashed to $93.13 (-17.55%). IndiGo hit upper circuit at ₹4,614.90. Best day for Nifty in 11 months.
previous_sessions.error_analysis: Deal scenario materialised — the 20% probability outcome. Lesson (FORECAST_PAT003): For binary geopolitical forecasts, best-case outcomes tend to be underweighted. When deal/ceasefire materialises, regime flips entirely — not incrementally. Future forecasts must include explicit reversal trigger: 'If deal → +2-4% Nifty rally'. Also: RBI rate unchanged on same day amplified the rally — always check central bank calendar on binary event days.
